source.sourcePath: raw/sources/DHF (인허가)/01_HAD1717MC, MG/03_설계개발 출력/02_CCL 및 승인원/승인원/기구/환경자료/동인산업/H&Abyz 2019년 ROHS/실리콘시트_8218-1401-105717.pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: KOTITI test report 8218-1401-105717 for Silicone Thermal Pad material testing against RoHS, halogen, and phthalate methods.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Provides test results for the submitted sample only; it states the report does not guarantee quality or performance of the entire product and is not related to KOLAS accreditation.
keyPoints: Sample name is Silicone Thermal Pad and material is Silicone Rubber.
Part numbers listed are GP-1, KGP-1, TR-M, TR-W, RM-2.
RoHS substances Pb, Cd, Hg, Cr6+, PBBs, and PBDEs were reported as not detected.
Halogen results report Fluorine 52 mg/kg, Chlorine 16 mg/kg, Bromine not detected, and Iodine not detected.
Phthalates BBP, DBP, DEHP, and DIBP were reported as not detected.

entities.name: KOLAS
entities.evidence: 이 성적서의 시험 결과는 KOLAS 인정과 관련 없음을 밝힙니다.

concepts.name: IEC 62321 RoHS test methods
concepts.evidence: Lead (Pb) IEC 62321-5:2013 산분해 후 ICP-OES 측정

evidence.claim: The document is KOTITI test report number 8218-1401-105717.
The report was issued on 2019.01.03 after receipt on 2018.12.27.
The tested sample was Silicone Thermal Pad.
The listed part numbers were GP-1, KGP-1, TR-M, TR-W, and RM-2.
evidence.evidenceText: 품번 GP-1, KGP-1, TR-M, TR-W, RM-2

evidence.claim: The sample material was Silicone Rubber.
The RoHS section cites EU Directive 2011/65/EU.
Lead, cadmium, mercury, hexavalent chromium, PBBs, and PBDEs were reported as not detected.
evidence.evidenceText: Lead (Pb) IEC 62321-5:2013 산분해 후 ICP-OES 측정 5 검출안됨 Cadmium (Cd) 2 검출안됨 Mercury (Hg) IEC 62321-4:2013 산분해 후 ICP-OES 측정 1 검출안됨 Hexavalent Chromium (Cr6+) IEC 62321-7-2:2017 용매 추출 후 UV-VIS 측정 8 검출안됨

evidence.claim: Halogen testing reported fluorine at 52 mg/kg and chlorine at 16 mg/kg.
evidence.evidenceText: Fluorine (F) IEC 62321-3-2:2013 & KS M 0180:2009 C-IC 측정 10 52 Chlorine (Cl) 10 16

evidence.claim: Halogen testing reported bromine and iodine as not detected.
Phthalates BBP, DBP, DEHP, and DIBP were reported as not detected.
evidence.evidenceText: butyl benzyl phthalate (BBP) IEC 62321-8:2017 용매 추출 후 GC-MS 측정 50 검출안됨 di-n-butyl phthalate (DBP) 50 검출안됨 di(ethylhexyl) phthalate (DEHP) 50 검출안됨 diisobutyl phthalate (DIBP) 50 검출안됨

evidence.claim: The report results are not related to KOLAS accreditation.
evidence.evidenceText: 이 성적서의 시험 결과는 KOLAS 인정과 관련 없음을 밝힙니다.

evidence.claim: The report applies to the submitted sample and sample name and does not guarantee quality or performance of the entire product.
evidence.evidenceText: 이 성적서는 의뢰자가 제시한 시료 및 시료명으로 시험한 평가결과로서, 전체 제품에 대한 품질 및 성능을 보증하지 않습니다.

reviewFlags.reason: The source is a laboratory test report, not a regulatory approval certificate; regulatory authority or jurisdiction is limited to cited RoHS directive and test laboratory information.
Product signal HAD/A/F 1417-1717 appears only in source metadata and not in the provided source text, so it was not used as a document product model.
